context: Tests whether the response correctly identifies the read-then-write race condition and provides a valid database-level fix.

checklist.name: Identifies read-then-write as the problem
checklist.description: Explains that separate SELECT then UPDATE creates a race window where concurrent requests read the same value before either writes

checklist.name: Recommends atomic UPDATE RETURNING
checklist.description: Suggests using UPDATE ... SET counter = counter + 1 RETURNING counter (or equivalent atomic single-statement approach)

checklist.name: Mentions alternative: transactions with row locking
checklist.description: Mentions SELECT FOR UPDATE or serializable isolation as an alternative approach

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Response does not contain factually wrong statements about PostgreSQL concurrency, transactions, or locking
